hero.label: Marketing Agency Heerde
hero.sub: VDH Agency helps businesses in Heerde, the Veluwe region and across the Netherlands grow with proven SEO strategies, social media marketing and custom-built websites.

services.label: Popular services
services.title: Most requested services
services.subtitle: These are our three most popular services, but there is more.
services.allServicesDesc: We also offer: Online Marketing, Branding & Identity and Digital Analytics.
services.seoDesc: More visibility in Google with a proven SEO strategy and targeted SEA campaigns that deliver direct results.
services.socialDesc: From the introductory meeting to publication, we handle everything: content planning, on-location filming and professional video editing, fully taken care of.
services.webDesc: Professional, fast and mobile-friendly websites that convert and rank well in search engines.

about.label: About VDH Agency
about.title: Personal. Committed. Results-driven.
about.p1: VDH Agency is a digital marketing agency based in Heerde (Gelderland), founded in 2026 by Lars van der Hoek. The agency helps SMEs, freelancers and startups across the Netherlands grow online, fully remote through online services and video consultations.
about.p2: You always have one dedicated point of contact and direct communication, with no middlemen or hidden costs.

contentSection.label: Who we work for
contentSection.title: Marketing for Dutch SMEs
contentSection.p1: VDH Agency helps independent entrepreneurs, SMEs and startups across the Netherlands grow through targeted online marketing. Whether you're based in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Utrecht, Eindhoven or anywhere else in the Netherlands: we work remotely and are flexible in how we collaborate.
contentSection.p2: We combine SEO, SEA, social media marketing, web design and digital analytics into a coherent package. But you can also use a single service: we help you figure out what fits your situation and budget, without pushing you towards more than you need.
contentSection.p3: At VDH Agency you always work directly with the specialist on your project. No middlemen, no account managers, just clear communication and full involvement in your growth.

process.label: How we work
process.title: From introduction to growth
process.s1desc: We discuss your goals, challenges and opportunities in a no-obligation online conversation, via video or phone.
process.s2desc: We create a tailor-made plan aligned with your goals and budget.
process.s3desc: We get to work with transparent communication and regular updates.
process.s4desc: We measure results, continuously optimise and scale what works.

cta.label: Ready to grow?
cta.title: Let's take your business to the next level together.
cta.sub: Contact us today for a no-obligation conversation.

dienstenPage.label: Our services
dienstenPage.title: Everything you need to grow online
dienstenPage.sub: From SEO to social media and websites: we deliver measurable results.
dienstenPage.seoDesc: Search engine optimisation (SEO) and paid advertising (SEA) are the backbone of online growth. We analyse your market, optimise your website and set up targeted campaigns that convert visitors into customers.
dienstenPage.socialDesc: From strategy and on-location filming to professional video editing and paid advertising on Facebook and Instagram. We fully take your social media off your hands: consistent, professional and focused on growth.
dienstenPage.webDesc: A good website is fast, mobile-friendly and converts visitors into customers. We build custom websites that not only look great but are also technically optimised for search engines.
dienstenPage.noServiceTitle: Don't see what you're looking for?
dienstenPage.noServiceDesc: Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation and we'll find the right approach for your situation together.
dienstenPage.onlineMarketingDesc: More customers through Google, Facebook and email. We combine SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, email marketing and copywriting into a strategy that delivers results.
dienstenPage.brandingDesc: A professional visual identity that radiates trust. Logo, colour palette, typography and brand guidelines, so your brand is recognisable everywhere.
dienstenPage.ecomDesc: We build webshops that inspire trust, load fast and rank in Google. From platform selection to Google Shopping, fully managed.
dienstenPage.analyseDesc: Without data you're flying blind. We install GA4 correctly, set up conversion tracking and build clear dashboards so you always know how your marketing performs.

seoPage.label: SEO & SEA
seoPage.title: More customers via Google: SEO & SEA for SMEs
seoPage.sub: We make sure your business is found by people actively searching for your services.
seoPage.whatP1: SEO (search engine optimisation) ensures your website ranks higher organically in Google, meaning more visitors without paying per click. SEA (search engine advertising) are the paid ads at the top of Google, immediately visible to your target audience.
seoPage.whatP2: The combination of SEO and SEA is powerful: SEA delivers immediate results while SEO builds a sustainable stream of visitors over time. At VDH Agency we combine both strategies, tailored to your budget and goals.
seoPage.whatP3: We always start with a thorough audit of your current situation. Based on that we create a concrete strategy: no vague promises, just a clear plan with measurable KPIs.
seoPage.howTitle: How does our SEO & SEA process work?
seoPage.step1Desc: We fully analyse your website: loading speed, mobile display, structure, technical errors and existing ranking positions.
seoPage.step2Desc: We identify the keywords your target audience actively searches for, focusing on conversion and not just traffic.
seoPage.step3Desc: Titles, meta descriptions, content and internal link structure are optimised for both Google and the reader.
seoPage.step4Desc: We set up targeted campaigns, monitor the budget carefully and optimise weekly based on data.
seoPage.step5Desc: You receive a clear monthly report with rankings, traffic, conversions and planned actions for the next month.
seoPage.faq1Q: How quickly will I see results from SEO?
seoPage.faq1A: SEO is a long-term strategy. Initial improvements in rankings are typically visible after 3-6 months. Within 6-12 months you build a stable stream of organic traffic.
seoPage.faq2Q: How much does an SEO agency or Google Ads cost at VDH Agency?
seoPage.faq2A: Our SEO packages start from €350 per month for local SEO and from €650 per month for national SEO including content. Google Ads management starts from €200 per month (excluding ad spend). Exact costs depend on your market and goals, we discuss it without obligation.
seoPage.faq3Q: Do you guarantee a certain ranking?
seoPage.faq3A: No. Any agency that guarantees ranking positions is lying. Google determines rankings based on hundreds of factors. We guarantee a professional, data-driven approach and transparent reporting.
seoPage.faq4Q: Can I combine SEO and Google Ads?
seoPage.faq4A: Absolutely, and we recommend it. SEA gives immediate visibility while SEO builds. Over time, strong organic presence lowers your total advertising costs.

socialPage.label: Social Media Management
socialPage.title: Social media management: content, video & Meta Ads
socialPage.sub: From strategy and on-location filming to professional editing and paid advertising: we fully take your social media off your hands.
socialPage.whatTitle: What does social media management involve?
socialPage.whatP1: Social media management goes beyond posting a photo. It starts with a well-thought-out strategy: which channels does your target audience use, what message resonates, and how do you ensure consistency?
socialPage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we handle the entire process. We start with an introductory meeting to understand your brand, goals and target audience. Then we film on location, professionally edit the content and boost reach with targeted Meta Ads on Facebook and Instagram.
socialPage.whatP3: Consistency is the key. The algorithm rewards accounts that regularly post quality content, and paid advertising ensures you're visible beyond your existing followers too.
socialPage.howTitle: How does our social media management work?
socialPage.step1Desc: We analyse your brand, target audience and competitors. Based on this we create a content calendar and determine which channels and formats work best.
socialPage.step2Desc: We come to you for professional shoots. Whether video content, product photos or behind-the-scenes material: we take care of it.
socialPage.step3Desc: Raw footage is transformed into sharp, brand-consistent content, including subtitles, music and colour correction.
socialPage.step4Desc: We amplify organic content with targeted paid advertising. We build the campaigns, monitor the budget and optimise for conversion.
socialPage.step5Desc: Content is published weekly at the optimal time. Each month you receive an overview of reach, engagement, growth and recommendations.
socialPage.faq1Q: Which social media channels do you manage?
socialPage.faq1A: We manage Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn and TikTok. Which channels we use depends on your target audience and goals. We advise you on this free of charge.
socialPage.faq2A: We post a minimum of 3 times per week as standard. The exact frequency is agreed in the strategy based on your goals and budget.
socialPage.faq3Q: Do I still need to do anything myself?
socialPage.faq3A: As little as possible. We fully take care of everything. We ask you to give us access to your channels and be available for the content shoots.
socialPage.faq4Q: How quickly do we see results on social media?
socialPage.faq4A: Organic growth requires consistency. First results are typically visible within 4-8 weeks. Meta Ads deliver immediate reach and results, from day one of the campaign.

webPage.label: Website Development
webPage.title: A website that sells: fast, beautiful and findable
webPage.sub: Custom-built websites that not only look great but actually generate customers.
webPage.whatP1: A good website is more than a digital business card. It's your best salesperson: active 24/7, always available. But it needs to load fast, be easy to navigate and convince visitors to take action.
webPage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we build websites that perform on all fronts. We start by understanding your business, target audience and goals. Then we design and build a website fully tailored to those needs.
webPage.whatP3: Every website is built with SEO as the foundation: correct structure, fast loading times, mobile optimisation and technical quality. That way your new website scores better from day one than a standard template.
webPage.howTitle: How do we build your website?
webPage.step1Desc: We discuss your goals, target audience, desired style and functionalities. Based on this we create a concrete proposal.
webPage.step2Desc: We design a unique layout that fits your brand. You see a prototype first, and only after your approval do we start building.
webPage.step3Desc: We build the website on modern, stable technology. Clean code, fast loading times and a CMS so you can easily update content yourself.
webPage.step4Desc: All technical SEO elements are built in: metadata, schema markup, sitemap, robots.txt, canonicals and PageSpeed optimisation.
webPage.step5Desc: We ensure a smooth launch and are there during the first weeks to resolve any teething problems.
webPage.faqTitle: Questions about having a website built
webPage.faq1Q: How much does a website cost at VDH Agency?
webPage.faq1A: A professional business website at VDH Agency starts from €1,500. A more extensive site with CMS and custom functionality runs to €3,500 or more. A webshop starts from €2,500. We always send a free quote after an introductory call.
webPage.faq2Q: How long does it take to build a website?
webPage.faq2A: A standard business website is typically live within 2-4 weeks. More complex projects take longer. We always agree on a realistic timeline.
webPage.faq3Q: Can I update my website myself after delivery?
webPage.faq3A: Yes. We build with a user-friendly CMS so you can update texts, images and content yourself without technical knowledge.
webPage.faq4Q: Will my website be findable in Google?
webPage.faq4A: We build every website with a strong SEO foundation. Whether you want to actively work on SEO afterwards is your choice. We offer that as a separate service.

onlineMarketingPage.label: Online Marketing
onlineMarketingPage.title: Online marketing that grows: more customers, more revenue
onlineMarketingPage.sub: SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, email marketing and persuasive copy. All under one roof.
onlineMarketingPage.whatP1: Online marketing is the umbrella term for all digital channels that attract customers. From organic search traffic via SEO to direct advertising on Google and Meta. Each channel has its role and its moment.
onlineMarketingPage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we combine the most effective channels based on your goals and budget. We build a marketing mix that delivers results both short and long term, so you're not dependent on just one channel.
onlineMarketingPage.whatP3: Whether you want more enquiries quickly through ads or want to grow structurally through SEO and content: we create a strategy that fits your situation and scales with your growth.
onlineMarketingPage.howTitle: How do we approach online marketing?
onlineMarketingPage.step1Desc: Your website higher in Google: more organic traffic without paying per click. With technical audit, keyword research and on-page optimisation.
onlineMarketingPage.step2Desc: Immediate visibility at the top of Google. We set up targeted campaigns, monitor the budget carefully and optimise weekly based on data.
onlineMarketingPage.step3Desc: Paid advertising on the biggest social platforms. We target the right audience at the right moment with conversion-focused creatives.
onlineMarketingPage.step4Desc: Automated email flows and newsletters that convert visitors into customers and activate existing clients. With tools like Mailchimp or Klaviyo.
onlineMarketingPage.step5Desc: Persuasive copy that converts: from landing pages and product descriptions to blog posts and ad copy.
onlineMarketingPage.faq1Q: Which channels are most effective for my business?
onlineMarketingPage.faq1A: That depends on your target audience, market and budget. In an introductory conversation we analyse your situation and advise which mix delivers the most, without selling you what you don't need.
onlineMarketingPage.faq2Q: Can I start with one channel and expand later?
onlineMarketingPage.faq2A: Absolutely. Many clients start with SEO or Google Ads and add Meta Ads or email marketing later. We build the approach step by step at your pace.
onlineMarketingPage.faq3Q: What is the minimum advertising budget?
onlineMarketingPage.faq3A: For Google Ads we recommend at least €300-500 per month in ad spend. For Meta Ads you can start from €200 per month. The management fee is separate from this.
onlineMarketingPage.faq4A: We connect Google Analytics 4 and Search Console to your account and report monthly on traffic, conversions, cost per result and growth compared to the previous period.

brandingPage.label: Branding
brandingPage.title: Logo & brand identity: a brand that sticks
brandingPage.sub: We design a professional visual identity that radiates trust and sets your business apart from the competition.
brandingPage.whatP1: Branding is more than a logo. It's the complete visual identity of your business: how you look, how you communicate and how customers remember you. A strong brand makes every other marketing channel more effective.
brandingPage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we design logos and brand identities that look professional on every medium: website, social media, business cards and quotes. Recognisable, consistent and timeless, so your brand inspires customers to choose you.
brandingPage.whatP3: A strong brand identity immediately increases trust with potential customers. Consistency in colour, typography and tone of voice is the foundation of every successful brand.
brandingPage.howTitle: How do we create your brand identity?
brandingPage.step1Desc: We discuss your business, target audience, values and the image you want to project. Based on this we create a clear briefing.
brandingPage.step2Desc: We design multiple logo concepts based on the briefing. You choose the direction that fits best and we refine until it's perfect.
brandingPage.step3Desc: We establish a colour palette and typeface choice that suits your brand and target audience, including exact colour codes for digital and print.
brandingPage.step4Desc: The logo and style choices are developed across all applications: social media templates, letterhead, business cards and more.
brandingPage.step5Desc: You receive all logo files in vector (AI, SVG, PDF, PNG) and a clear brand guidelines document for consistent application.
brandingPage.faq1Q: Do I need a new logo if I already have one?
brandingPage.faq1A: Not necessarily. If your logo looks dated or unprofessional, a refresh can make a big difference. We look together at whether refining or completely renewing is the right choice.
brandingPage.faq2Q: How long does a brand identity project take?
brandingPage.faq2A: A logo project typically takes 1-2 weeks. A complete brand identity including templates and brand guidelines is ready within 2-4 weeks, depending on feedback rounds.
brandingPage.faq3Q: What do I receive as the end result?
brandingPage.faq3A: You receive all logo files in vector (AI, PDF, SVG) and PNG, a colour palette with exact codes, typeface selection, brand guidelines document and optionally social media templates.
brandingPage.faq4Q: Can you adjust my existing logo?
brandingPage.faq4A: Absolutely. We can refine, modernise or completely renew your existing logo, depending on what best fits your goals. We discuss the options without obligation.

ecommercePage.label: E-commerce
ecommercePage.title: Webshop development: e-commerce that sells
ecommercePage.sub: From product page to checkout: we build webshops that convert and rank in Google.
ecommercePage.whatP1: A webshop is more than putting products online. Visitors need to trust the process, the buying journey must be seamless, and the shop must be found in Google. That requires technical knowledge, UX insight and marketing experience.
ecommercePage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we build webshops that perform on all fronts. We think with you about product titles, category structure and user experience, because a slow or unclear checkout costs you revenue.
ecommercePage.whatP3: After launch we're still here. We optimise product pages for SEO, connect Google Shopping and monitor performance through analytics.
ecommercePage.step1Desc: We discuss your products, target audience and budget. Based on that we choose the right platform: WooCommerce, Shopify or custom development.
ecommercePage.step2Desc: We design a clear, trust-building shopping experience. From homepage to checkout: every step is optimised for conversion.
ecommercePage.step3Desc: We build the shop and connect payment partners, track & trace, inventory management and other tools you need.
ecommercePage.step4Desc: Product pages are optimised for search engines. We connect Google Merchant Center for Shopping ads.
ecommercePage.step5Desc: After launch we monitor conversion, behaviour and revenue. We continuously optimise based on data.
ecommercePage.faq1Q: Which platform do you use for webshops?
ecommercePage.faq1A: It depends on your situation. For smaller shops we recommend Shopify for its ease of use. For more flexibility or integrations we choose WooCommerce. Custom development is also an option.
ecommercePage.faq2Q: Can I manage my webshop myself?
ecommercePage.faq2A: Yes. We always build with a user-friendly CMS. Adding products, adjusting prices, managing orders: you do that yourself, without technical knowledge.
ecommercePage.faq3Q: How do you make sure my webshop is found?
ecommercePage.faq3A: We build every webshop with a strong SEO foundation: correct product structure, loading speed, canonicals and schema markup. Then we connect Google Merchant Center for Shopping ads.
ecommercePage.faq4Q: Can you optimise my existing webshop?
ecommercePage.faq4A: Absolutely. We do a full audit of your current shop and create a priority list: technical improvements, SEO opportunities and conversion improvements.

analysePage.label: Digital Analytics
analysePage.title: Data that works: insight into your online growth
analysePage.sub: We translate data into concrete decisions. From GA4 to dashboards: always know how your online marketing performs.
analysePage.whatTitle: Why is data analysis so important?
analysePage.whatP1: Without data you're flying blind. You invest in marketing but don't know what works. Which pages convert? Where do visitors drop off? Which ad generates the most customers?
analysePage.whatP2: With the right analytics setup you get answers to those questions. At VDH Agency we install and configure Google Analytics 4 correctly, set up conversion tracking and build clear reports so you always know where you stand.
analysePage.whatP3: Data analysis isn't a luxury. It's the foundation for better marketing decisions and more efficient use of your budget.
analysePage.howTitle: How do we improve your digital analytics?
analysePage.step1Desc: We check your current setup: is the tracking correct, is data missing, are there implementation errors? Often more goes wrong than you'd think.
analysePage.step2Desc: We install Google Analytics 4 correctly, including events, goal conversions and e-commerce tracking where applicable.
analysePage.step3Desc: We measure what matters: form submissions, phone calls, purchases, newsletter sign-ups. Every valuable action is tracked.
analysePage.step4Desc: You get a clear dashboard with the KPIs relevant to you: no endless tables, just insight on one screen.
analysePage.step5Desc: Each month we discuss results: what's going well, what can improve, and what are the next steps.
analysePage.faq1A: We always check whether the current setup is correct first. Many installations are missing important conversion events or recording duplicate data. A quick audit gives immediate insight.
analysePage.faq2Q: What's the difference between GA4 and Universal Analytics?
analysePage.faq2A: Universal Analytics was shut down by Google in 2023. GA4 is the successor with a different data model, based on events rather than sessions. If you haven't fully migrated to GA4, we'll help you do that.
analysePage.faq3Q: Can you also set up Google Tag Manager?
analysePage.faq3A: Yes. Google Tag Manager is the recommended way to implement tracking. We install GTM, connect GA4 and add all necessary tags, including Facebook Pixel, LinkedIn Insight and more.
analysePage.faq4Q: What does an analytics setup cost?
analysePage.faq4A: A basic GA4 setup starts from €200 (one-off). A full setup including Google Tag Manager, conversion tracking, Facebook Pixel and monthly dashboard starts from €350. We always send a no-obligation quote after an initial conversation.

overPage.label: About VDH Agency
overPage.title: The story behind VDH Agency
overPage.sub: A passion for digital marketing, a mission to grow businesses.
overPage.storyTitle: Who is Lars van der Hoek?
overPage.p1: I'm Lars van der Hoek, founder of VDH Agency. After years of working in digital marketing for a range of businesses, I started my own agency in 2026. The reason: I kept seeing SMEs that wanted to grow online, but kept running into agencies that were too expensive, too opaque, or too impersonal.
overPage.p2: At VDH Agency, you always work directly with me, not with an account manager who passes your brief to someone else. I write your SEO strategy, manage your Google Ads, and build or optimise your website. That means faster communication, less noise, and better results.
overPage.p3: My approach always starts with listening. I want to understand how your business works, who your customers are, and what you actually need. Only then do I propose a strategy, not an off-the-shelf package, but something that genuinely fits your situation.
overPage.p4: VDH Agency is based in Heerde (Gelderland) and works with freelancers, SMEs, and startups across the Netherlands. All services are delivered fully remotely, via video consultations, email and phone. Location is never a barrier: what counts is a dedicated specialist who understands your goals and goes the extra mile.
overPage.servicesTitle: What I can do for you
overPage.servicesSub: From search engine optimisation to web design, everything you need to grow online.
overPage.v1desc: We always work with clear KPIs and measurable goals. No vague promises, concrete agreements about what we'll achieve and how we'll measure it.
overPage.v2desc: No hidden costs, no smoke and mirrors. You always know exactly what's being done, why, and what it delivers.
overPage.v3desc: Direct line with Lars, always. No account managers, no middlemen. You call or email the person who is actually working on your project.
overPage.founderBio: I help Dutch businesses grow through SEO, Social Media and web design. Honest about what works, direct in communication and personally involved in every project, from the first call to the final result.
overPage.p5: My background covers the full digital marketing toolkit. I work daily with Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console, Google Ads, Meta Business Suite and WordPress. For websites I use modern technology that is fast, secure and easy to manage, so everything is technically sound and you never have to worry about the details.
overPage.p6: What sets me apart from larger agencies: there's no handover. You have one person who knows your project inside out, from the first conversation to the monthly report. Nothing gets lost between what you want and what actually gets done.
overPage.faq1Q: Do you work with small businesses and startups?
overPage.faq1A: Yes. A large part of my clients are small SMEs or entrepreneurs just starting out. I adapt my approach to suit you, and there's no minimum budget. There is, however, an honest conversation about what's realistic for your situation and goals.
overPage.faq2Q: Do you do everything yourself or work with others?
overPage.faq2A: I do everything myself: strategy, execution and communication. No external freelancers, no outsourced tasks. That means one point of contact, no surprises, and someone who is genuinely invested in your results.
overPage.faq3Q: Which cities and regions do you serve?
overPage.faq3A: VDH Agency is based in Heerde (Gelderland) and works fully online for clients across the Netherlands. All conversations and consultations take place via video, email and phone, efficient collaboration without travel time. Clients in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Utrecht, The Hague, Eindhoven and Groningen, as well as a growing number of businesses in the Veluwe region.
overPage.faq4Q: What does working with VDH Agency cost?
overPage.faq4A: It depends on the service and scope. I don't work with fixed packages, I propose a price based on your specific situation. Request a no-obligation quote via the contact page and I'll send you a proposal within 24 hours.

contactPage.label: Contact
contactPage.title: Let's get acquainted
contactPage.sub: Ready to grow your business? Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.successDesc: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contactPage.pitch: No sales talk. Just an honest online conversation, via video or phone, about what digital marketing can do for your business.
